about.title: About
menu.errorCorrection.tooltip: Recovery strength when a QR code is partly damaged or dirty. Higher levels recover better but make the QR denser.
menu.qr.tooltip: Configure QR chunking, display size, and error correction level. Compression is fixed to Zstd.
menu.qrChunkSize.tooltip: Characters per QR page. Smaller values create more pages but easier-to-read QR codes.
menu.qrDisplaySize.tooltip: QR image size on screen. Adjust for the scanner device and display size.
section.connection.title: Connection
section.devices.title: Devices
section.project.meta: Basic information passed to the mobile app.
section.project.title: Project
section.traps.meta: Edit conditions, thresholds, and enabled state, up to {0}.
section.traps.title: Traps
section.watch.meta: Choose addresses shown in the mobile app time chart, up to {0}.
section.watch.title: Time Chart Targets
status.noDeviceRowsPasted: No device rows can be pasted
status.noTrapRowsPasted: No trap rows can be pasted
status.noWatchRowsPasted: No time chart rows can be pasted
status.timeChartMax: Time chart can contain up to {0} channels.
status.trapMax: Traps can contain up to {0} rows.
tooltip.devicesGrid: Copy and paste tab-separated rows from Excel. Columns are Address / Data type / Comment.
tooltip.moveDeviceDown: Move selected device rows down. Alt+Down also works.
tooltip.moveDeviceUp: Move selected device rows up. Alt+Up also works.
tooltip.moveTrapDown: Move selected trap rows down. Alt+Down also works.
tooltip.moveTrapUp: Move selected trap rows up. Alt+Up also works.
tooltip.moveWatchDown: Move selected time chart rows down. Alt+Down also works.
tooltip.moveWatchUp: Move selected time chart rows up. Alt+Up also works.
tooltip.trapsGrid: Copy and paste tab-separated rows from Excel. Columns are Address / Data type / Condition / Threshold / Enabled.
tooltip.watchGrid: Copy and paste tab-separated rows from Excel. Columns are Address / Data type.
